description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a single cutaway design, reminiscent of the classic Les Paul style. The body features a glossy, dark red and black sunburst finish with visible wood grain, and is equipped with two humbucker pickups, four control knobs, and a three-way toggle switch. The neck is made of a lighter wood, likely maple or mahogany, and is attached to a headstock with three tuning pegs on each side, finished in a matching wood tone. The back of the guitar shows a control cavity cover, indicating access to the electronics. The hardware, including the bridge, tuning pegs, and pickup covers, appears to be metallic, likely chrome or nickel-plated. The overall construction suggests a high-quality instrument suitable for professional use in urban music settings.
description: A glossy, sunburst-finished electric guitar with a single cutaway body, dual humbucker pickups, and metallic hardware. The neck and headstock are made of lighter wood, and the body features four control knobs and a toggle switch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sunburst finish, dual humbucker pickups, four control knobs, and toggle switch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the guitar's thickness and the profile of the neck and headstock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wood grain, control cavity cover, and the back of the neck and headstock.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the edge of the body and the side profile of the hardware and controls.
attribute_headstock_design: Three-per-side tuning pegs, classic Les Paul shape, no visible logo
